framework.name: Microtransaction Floor: $0.01 USDC
framework.description: Stripe supports charges as low as $0.01 USDC with 1.5% fees, enabling true pay-per-API-call economics. Card networks can't compete at this price point — interchange alone would exceed the transaction value. This positions crypto rails as the only viable substrate for high-frequency, low-value agent transactions.
framework.raw_quote: Individual charges can be as low as 0.01 USDC. Pricing is 1.5% per successful charge (rounded to the nearest cent).
